title: Gridlock+
description: A collection of tournament-approved mods for the Gridlock Tournament.
body:
![Gridlock Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09dbb144c59a705b38b7c33327892cc0e62ea44d.png)
# Official Gridlock Tournament Modpack

This modpack contains the current list of mods approved for use in the Gridlock Tournament. It is intended to provide a curated selection of performance and quality-of-life improvements to support a smooth and consistent competitive experience.

If you wish to suggest a mod, please open a ticket in our Discord. Staff will review all submissions and may approve certain mods at their discretion.

## Current Legal Mods

- Fabric API
- Sodium  
- Planifolia  
- GUI Scale Splitter  
- Mod Menu (required dependency for GUI Scale Splitter)

Additional Mac-specific mods are allowed, and can be found [on the wiki](https://playgridlock.gg/wiki/tournament/rules#instance-and-client).

This list may be updated as the mod selection is reviewed and adjusted over time.
